Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "ZIX-2000-080D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zix.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $2000 to zero out the tape buffer to allow the game sounds to work.
